subtitle: this Turn of the Wheel
author: Robert Jordan & Brandon Sanderson
note: The current Turn of the Wheel — the living Age's company — sorted into specialty classes, in the manner of the muster roll. Channelers filed by Ajah (the colors are canon). The Dragon, the Wolf, and the Gambler are three ta'veren but one weave: the One, a third each. Moiraine, Blue, leads the battalion. roster.json is the source of truth; characters by Robert Jordan & Brandon Sanderson, inspiration only.

classes.label: Blue Ajah · Command
classes.spec: causes & the cause — leader of the battalion

classes.label: The Amyrlin Seat
classes.spec: all Ajahs and none · the Flame of Tar Valon

classes.label: The One
classes.spec: three ta'veren · one third each · one total

members.name: Moiraine Damodred
members.specialty: Blue Ajah. Leader of the battalion. She found the Dragon and bent her whole life to the cause — spent herself into the redstone doorway, and came back to finish it.

members.name: Siuan Sanche
members.specialty: Blue. The Amyrlin who staked the White Tower on Moiraine's secret hunt. Fisherman's daughter, iron will, no patience for fools.

members.name: Nynaeve al'Meara
members.specialty: Yellow. Wisdom of Emond's Field; the angriest, strongest Healer alive. Healed gentling and madness the Tower swore could not be Healed.

members.name: Cadsuane Melaidhrin
members.specialty: Green, the Battle Ajah. The most formidable living Aes Sedai — a legend before the rest were born. Teaches kings and Dragons manners.

members.name: Verin Mathwin
members.specialty: Brown. Scholar of the deep stacks — who spent seventy years inside the Black Ajah to betray it with a single book. Knowledge is the longest blade.

members.name: Pevara Tazanovni
members.specialty: Red, the Ajah that hunts men who can channel — and the first Red to bond an Asha'man. The hunt, turned to alliance.

members.name: Egwene al'Vere
members.specialty: Innkeeper's daughter of Emond's Field who became the Amyrlin Seat — all Ajahs and none. The Flame of Tar Valon; she reunited a broken Tower and did not bend.

members.name: Lanfear
members.specialty: Mierin. Most powerful of the Chosen; love soured into obsession; she who helped bore the Bore and let the Dark One's breath in.

members.name: Moridin
members.specialty: Ishamael reborn. Nae'blis — nearest the Dark One's hand. The Betrayer of Hope who only wants the Wheel to stop turning.

members.name: Graendal
members.specialty: Compulsion incarnate. Ruled through ruined minds and beautiful slaves; never where the knife is pointed.

members.name: Demandred
members.specialty: The great general the Light never saw coming — brilliance soured to spite, searching a whole war for the Dragon to challenge.

members.name: al'Lan Mandragoran
members.specialty: Dai Shan. Uncrowned King of Malkier; Moiraine's Warder; the blade that does not break. Death is lighter than a feather.

members.name: Aviendha
members.specialty: Maiden of the Spear turned Wise One. Toh and honor and a future glimpsed through the glass columns; the desert's keenest edge.

members.name: The Wise Ones
members.specialty: Walkers in the dream, keepers of ji'e'toh; the spine of the Aiel and the conscience of their chiefs.

members.name: Tam al'Thor
members.specialty: Rand's father. Second Captain, blademaster's heron-marked blade, and a farmer's steady love — the man who carried a baby off Dragonmount.

members.name: Loial
members.specialty: Ogier of Stedding Shangtai; ninety years young and 'hasty.' Would rather read than fight — and fights anyway. Also: he writes the book.

members.name: Rand al'Thor
members.specialty: the Dragon Reborn. The Light's champion; he who must stand at Shayol Ghul. Fire, the Power, and the weight of every Age on one sheepherder's shoulders.

members.name: Perrin Aybara
members.specialty: Wolfbrother; the hammer that chooses to be a hammer and not an axe; walker in the wolf-dream; Lord of the Two Rivers who never wanted a title.

members.name: Matrim Cauthon
members.specialty: the Gambler; luckiest man alive; sounder of the Horn of Valere; carrying the memories of a thousand dead generals in one reluctant head.
